title: T-050 — UI: TEC-050 Cost History panel + TEC-051 Cost Edit/Recompute modal
prompt: Build cost history panel (TEC-050) per §11.5 plus the cost-rollup recompute modal (TEC-051 PARTIAL). Match `cost_history_screen` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:761-820 and `cost_rollup_recompute_modal` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:518-537. Uses T-021 endpoints; >20% delta triggers approver header field. RED tests/ui/tec-050-cost.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-050-cost.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Cost history timeline + recompute modal with V-TEC-53 high-variance approver field.
pipeline_inputs.details: Timeline shows source badges (manual/d365_sync/supplier_update/variance_roll). Recompute modal triggers POST /cost — for >20% deltas the modal reveals an Approver picker (Owner role).
acceptance_criteria: Given the cost panel renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:761-820 and design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:518-537, then timeline structure, source badges, and modal layout match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
Given cost delta exceeds 20%, when modal opens, then Approver picker is required.
Given user lacks technical.cost.edit, when on tab, then Edit button is hidden.
test_strategy: RED tests for parity + 20% threshold + RBAC.
risk_red_lines: Do not bypass V-TEC-53 approver requirement.
